testcase.name: test_status_for_real_session

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stripe_payments.py:79: in test_status_for_real_session assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_public_settings_proxy

failure.message: requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Invalid control character at: line 1 column 2 (char 1)

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:978: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:353: in raw_decode obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Invalid control character at: line 1 column 2 (char 1)
